MOTION TO INTERVENE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYDS' MOTION TO INTERVENE.

Proposed intervenor Certain Underwriters at Lloyds' unopposed motion for leave to intervene is granted. (Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 387; Ins. Code Sec. 11580; Reliance Insurance Co. v. Superior Court (2000) 84 Cal.App.4th 383, 386-387 ["where the insurer may be subject to a direct action under Insurance Code section 11580 by a judgment creditor who has or will obtain a default judgment in a third party action against the insured, intervention is appropriate."].)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schuman: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
